task_objective: Eliminate src/index.css and migrate all styling properties inline to src/index.tsx, redesigning the Versions panel to add spacing and the Last Operation panel to wrap inline with parenthesized timestamp.
design_decisions: Deleted the CSS stylesheet entirely because it appends styles to the background loader frame instead of the rendering window context.
Inlined all CSS rules directly into the React components (FullWidthToggle, Versions container, Status and Last Operation fields).
Redesigned the Last Operation row to wrap naturally by setting childrenLayout='inline' and using a single text flow div with white-space 'normal' and word-break 'break-word'.
Appended parenthesized timestamp (HH:MM:SS) inline at the end of the Last Operation text.
Increased the spacing between versions list items to a gap of 8px and font-size of 12px.
results: All 246 python unit tests passed, typescript check passed, and frontend rollup build compiled successfully.
